name: DGB Group N.V.
summary: DGB Group N.V. supplies sustainable energy and energy systems in the Netherlands. The company also develops and delivers software solutions to agricultural entrepreneurs. It serves agricultural and animal sectors. The company was formerly known as Verenigde Nederlandse Compagnie N.V. and changed its name to DGB Group N.V. in January 2018. DGB Group N.V. was founded in 1957 is based in Hardenberg, the Netherlands.
